controls.title: AI software supply chain risk assessment
controls.description: Identify and assess risks specific to AI software supply chains, including model provenance, training data lineage, and framework dependencies.

controls.title: ML artifact signing and verification
controls.description: Implement cryptographic signing for ML models, weights, and artifacts to ensure integrity and provenance verification throughout the supply chain.

controls.title: Model provenance tracking
controls.description: Maintain verifiable records of model origin, training data sources, fine-tuning history, and deployment lineage.

controls.title: Training data supply chain integrity
controls.description: Verify integrity and provenance of training data sources, including checks for data poisoning, unauthorized modifications, and license compliance.

controls.title: AI dependency management
controls.description: Track and manage dependencies in AI/ML frameworks, libraries, and tools with SBOM generation and vulnerability monitoring.

controls.title: Secure model distribution
controls.description: Establish secure channels and verification mechanisms for distributing models, weights, and adapters across environments.

controls.title: AI-enhanced threat detection
controls.description: Leverage AI capabilities to improve threat detection while understanding limitations and adversarial risks to AI-powered security tools.

controls.title: AI attack surface mapping
controls.description: Map and maintain visibility of AI-specific attack surfaces including model endpoints, training pipelines, inference APIs, and agent tool interfaces.

controls.title: AI incident response procedures
controls.description: Develop and maintain AI-specific incident response procedures covering model compromise, data poisoning, prompt injection, and agent hijacking scenarios.

controls.title: Defender AI literacy and training
controls.description: Ensure security teams have training and skills to defend AI systems, including understanding of ML pipelines, LLM architectures, and agentic systems.

controls.title: AI security monitoring and telemetry
controls.description: Implement monitoring specific to AI systems: inference anomalies, prompt injection attempts, model drift, and agent behavioral deviations.

controls.title: AI red teaming and adversarial testing
controls.description: Conduct regular adversarial testing of AI systems including prompt injection, jailbreak, data extraction, and agent manipulation exercises.

controls.title: AI security risk taxonomy
controls.description: Establish and maintain a security-focused risk taxonomy specific to AI systems covering model, data, infrastructure, and application layers.

controls.title: AI risk assessment methodology
controls.description: Define and apply a structured methodology for assessing AI security risks, including likelihood and impact scoring calibrated for AI-specific threats.

controls.title: AI security scorecard
controls.description: Implement a scorecard mechanism to evaluate and communicate the security posture of AI systems across development, deployment, and operations.

controls.title: AI security controls checklist
controls.description: Maintain a comprehensive checklist of security controls applicable to AI systems, mapped to organizational risk tolerance and deployment context.

controls.title: Third-party AI risk management
controls.description: Establish governance processes for evaluating and managing security risks from third-party AI models, APIs, and services.

controls.title: AI regulatory compliance mapping
controls.description: Map AI security requirements to applicable regulations and standards, maintaining compliance traceability across jurisdictions.

controls.title: Human-governed and accountable agents
controls.description: Ensure agentic AI systems maintain meaningful human control with clear accountability, risk-based oversight, and defined authority boundaries.

controls.title: Risk-based human oversight
controls.description: Implement graduated human oversight proportional to the risk level and impact scope of agent actions, from full autonomy for low-risk to human-in-the-loop for high-risk.

controls.title: Authority boundary definition
controls.description: Define and enforce clear boundaries for what actions agents can take autonomously versus what requires human approval.

controls.title: Agent accountability chain
controls.description: Maintain a clear chain of accountability from agent actions to responsible humans, including audit trails and decision provenance.

controls.title: Bounded and resilient agents
controls.description: Ensure agents operate with purpose-specific entitlements, foundational cybersecurity controls, and continuous validation of behavior.

controls.title: Purpose-specific entitlements
controls.description: Grant agents minimum necessary permissions scoped to their specific task, with just-in-time elevation and automatic revocation.

controls.title: Agent cybersecurity baseline
controls.description: Apply foundational cybersecurity controls to agent infrastructure: authentication, encryption, input validation, secure communication channels.

controls.title: Continuous behavior validation
controls.description: Continuously monitor and validate agent behavior against expected patterns, with automated circuit-breakers for anomalous actions.

controls.title: Agent blast radius containment
controls.description: Implement isolation, sandboxing, and rollback mechanisms to limit the impact of compromised or malfunctioning agents.

controls.title: Transparent and verifiable agents
controls.description: Ensure AI agent operations are transparent through secure supply chain controls, comprehensive telemetry, and real-time monitoring.

controls.title: Agent supply chain security
controls.description: Verify integrity of all agent components: tools, MCP servers, plugins, prompt templates, and model weights loaded at runtime.

controls.title: Agent telemetry and observability
controls.description: Implement comprehensive logging and telemetry for agent decisions, tool calls, memory access, and inter-agent communication.

controls.title: Real-time agent monitoring
controls.description: Deploy real-time monitoring dashboards and alerting for agent operations, including anomaly detection on action patterns and resource usage.

controls.title: Agent action auditability
controls.description: Maintain immutable audit logs of all agent actions with sufficient detail to reconstruct decision chains and attribute outcomes.

changelog.change: Initial seed — 4 workstreams + agentic security principles
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
